source: Colab GPU (Phase B, regresslm_table3.ipynb) — released checkpoint, authors' exact recipe, transformers==4.53.2

claims.C1: Substantially supported: a SINGLE released checkpoint predicts across APPS (memory, rho=0.925) + KBSS (latency, rho=0.531) + CDSS (memory, 17 languages, avg rho=0.517). 'accuracy' is named in the claim but not present as a target in the released Code-Regression parquet (target column = memory bytes / latency ms), so accuracy is not independently reproduced from this release.
claims.C2: VERIFIED at paper scale: APPS Spearman = 0.9254 (n=512) > 0.9; matches card reference 0.926.
claims.C3: VERIFIED at paper scale: average Spearman across 17 CodeNet languages = 0.517 (n=200/lang) > 0.5.
